name: create_automation
description: Create a Cursor automation with the current user's authenticated Cursor session. Call only after the user has reviewed the automation draft. Saving shows a short confirmation summary of triggers, actions, and prompts.

description.description: Optional short description shown in the automations UI.

workflow.description: Automation Workflow proto JSON. Include reviewed triggers, actions, prompts, model, git, memory, and workflow options.

scope.description: Optional AutomationScope proto JSON value. Defaults to user scope when omitted.

templateId.description: Optional template id when creating from a template-like draft.

teamId.description: Optional numeric team id for team-scoped creation.
